features: PROTECT CLOTHING: The 151 Pefrect Space Dehumidifer Bags are a quick and easy way to help eliminate damp, mould, mildew and condensation,whilst protecting your clothes and combating musty odours.Simply pop into any clothing drawer or cupboard
QUICK & EASY: Simply open the pack remove the dehumidifer bags and place into drawers and cupboards to start working instantly to reduce moisture
MOISTURE TRAP: Highly absorbent, the formulation will draw damp and heavier moisture from the atmosphere, trapping it within the unit

MOULD & MILDEW: Using the 151 Small Space Dehumidifer reduces condensation preventing mould and mildew building up. Compact size allows the bags to be placed in any drawers or cupboards in the home or caravan
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: 151 Ready to use pack of 2
description: The 151 Dehumidifer Bags, quick and easy way to help eliminate damp, mould, mildew and condensation, protecting your clothes and combating musty odours. Simply pop into any clothing drawer or cupboard. Open the pack remove the dehumidifer bags and place into drawers and cupboards to start working instantly to reduce moisture. Highly absorbent, the formulation will draw damp and heavier moisture from the atmosphere, trapping it within the unit. Ready to use pack of 2
